description: 学生证通常就是借书证。办 card 需要带学生证。
examples_json: [{"en":"I need a library card to borrow books.","zh":"我需要借书证才能借书。"}]

description: borrow a book = 借书。return = 还书。
examples_json: [{"en":"How many books can I borrow at once?","zh":"我一次能借几本书？"}]

description: 续借已借的书。可以在网上或到柜台办理。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I renew this book online?","zh":"我能在网上续借这本书吗？"}]

description: 超过还书日期的。overdue book / overdue fine。
examples_json: [{"en":"This book is overdue. You need to pay a fine.","zh":"这本书逾期了，需要交罚款。"}]

description: 还书截止日期。due = 到期的。
examples_json: [{"en":"The due date is March 15th.","zh":"到期日是3月15日。"}]

description: 图书馆目录系统。网上或电脑查询。
examples_json: [{"en":"You can search the library catalogue online.","zh":"你可以在网上查图书馆目录。"}]

description: 只能在馆内阅读不能外借的书。
examples_json: [{"en":"Reference books cannot be taken out of the library.","zh":"参考书不能带出图书馆。"}]

description: 学生社团。join a club = 加入社团。
examples_json: [{"en":"How many clubs are there on campus?","zh":"校园里有多少个社团？"}]

description: 社团活动。extracurricular activity = 课外活动。
examples_json: [{"en":"What kind of activities does your club have?","zh":"你们社团有什么活动？"}]

description: 加入社团需要填写的表格。
examples_json: [{"en":"Please fill out this registration form.","zh"::请填写这张报名表。"}]

description: 会员身份。membership fee = 会费。
examples_json: [{"en":"Is there a membership fee to join the club?","zh":"加入社团需要会费吗？"}]

description: 校园餐卡。充值后刷卡用餐。
examples_json: [{"en":"You can pay with your meal card.","zh":"你可以用餐卡支付。"}]

description: 大学食堂/自助餐厅。和美式校园生活紧密相关。
examples_json: [{"en":"The cafeteria has a good selection of food.","zh":"食堂有很多菜品选择。"}]

difficulty: 今日特供/特色菜。today's special = 今日特供。
description: [{"en":"What's today's special at the cafeteria?","zh":"食堂今日特供是什么？"}]
餐卡余额。check balance = 查余额。
examples_json: [{"en":"My balance is running low. I need to top up.","zh":"我余额不多了，需要充值。"}]

description: 给餐卡充值。top up your meal card。
examples_json: [{"en":"Where can I top up my meal card?","zh":"我在哪可以给餐卡充值？"}]

description: 大学课程。选课/退课的核心词汇。
examples_json: [{"en":"This course is about modern Chinese history.","zh":"这门课关于中国现代史。"}]

description: 大学课程学分。一门课通常 2-4 学分。
examples_json: [{"en":"How many credits is this course worth?","zh":"这门课几个学分？"}]

description: 注册课程。registration period = 选课期。
examples_json: [{"en":"I need to register for my courses before Friday.","zh":"我需要在周五前选课。"}]

description: 学期。fall/spring semester = 秋/春季学期。
examples_json: [{"en":"What courses are you taking this semester?","zh":"你这学期选了什么课？"}]

description: 退课。drop a course = 退一门课。withdraw = 退出。
examples_json: [{"en":"You can drop a course within the first two weeks.","zh":"你可以在前两周内退课。"}]

description: 退课/选课的截止日期。
examples_json: [{"en":"The drop deadline is next Friday.","zh":"退课截止日期是下周五。"}]
